original: This stiff-necked kaithrit brandishes a slick-looking plasma rifle in one hand like it’s nothing thanks to his skin-tight layer of augment-weave armor. The flexible metallic suit flexes powerfully with his every movement, unintentionally highlighting his lissom form, bulging groin, and the pert swells of two decidedly feminine A-cups. If he wasn’t a kaithrit, you could easily confuse him a for a female. Of course, he compensates for this with a butch, luminescent mohawk. Large eyes flicker with alertness under a projected holovisor, beamed forth by implants in his temples, and when he shifts position, a short-range antenna wobbles along with his feline ears.\n\nIt’s a sure bet that this mechanized security cat has a grab-bag of other, less-visible cybernetics as well, waiting to spring on you at a moment’s notice.
